properties.name: app.frontend.base-url
properties.description: Flutter web client URL for CORS and Stripe checkout redirects.

properties.name: app.checkout.success-url
properties.description: Optional mobile Stripe success deep link. Falls back to app.frontend.base-url when unset.

properties.name: app.checkout.cancel-url
properties.description: Optional mobile Stripe cancel deep link.

properties.name: app.admin.seed-username
properties.description: Optional admin username created on startup if it does not exist.

properties.name: app.admin.seed-password
properties.description: Password for the seeded admin account.

properties.name: cloudinary.cloud-name
properties.description: Cloudinary cloud name for product image uploads.
